is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Plasmodium falciparum clinical isolates: 'A total of 64 Cameroonian isolates were used to characterize the in vitro drug sensitivity pattern and analyze the pfmdr1 polymorphisms.'

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports Pfmdr1 codon 86 (Asn/Tyr), a curated target marker: '88% carried the mutant codon Tyr-86'.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Frequencies given: 56 of 64 (88%) carried Tyr-86, 7 (11%) Asn-86, 1 mixed; per-isolate genotypes in Table 1.

sub_country_location.evidence: All isolates collected at Nlongkak Catholic missionary dispensary in Yaoundé, Cameroon — a specific town/clinic site below country level.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Samples collected between 1997 and 2000 — a window of ~3 years: 'conducted at the Nlongkak Catholic missionary dispensary in Yaoundé, Cameroon between 1997 and 2000'.

african_field_samples.evidence: Human clinical isolates from patients enrolled at a dispensary in Yaoundé, Cameroon (African country).

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical study with PCR/sequencing of 64 field isolates and in vitro drug assays.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Same study site and overlapping population as prior publications: 'This predominance of Tyr-86 (56 of 64 isolates, 88%) was reconfirmed in the present study... (1997–2000) at the same study site' and part of randomized clinical trials (refs 20,21); prior 1994-1996 data reported separately (refs 32,33). The 64 isolates here appear distinct (1997-2000) but part of a continuous surveillance series.

supplement.evidence: Per-isolate genotypes and codon frequencies fully reported in Table 1 and main text; no supplementary material required.

assessment.summary: Primary study of 64 P. falciparum clinical isolates from Yaoundé, Cameroon (Nlongkak dispensary, 1997-2000), reporting pfmdr1 codon 86 frequencies (Tyr-86 in 56/64, 88%) plus codon 184, 1034, 1042, 1246. Target marker Pfmdr1 86 with extractable counts, sub-country site resolution, and a <=3-year collection window. Eligible.
